title: DISASTER SURVIVAL & RESILIENCE
description: Climate disasters disproportionately displace marginalized and unhoused people. We provide emergency mutual aid, inclusive disaster planning, and resilience hubs prioritizing those most at risk.

title: UTILITY SHUTOFF PREVENTION
description: Utility shutoffs are a direct pipeline to eviction, instability, and family separation. We provide emergency utility relief and advocate for policies that categorize energy and water as human rights.

title: TOXIC INFRASTRUCTURE ADVOCACY
description: We document the health impacts of industrial pollution purposefully placed in marginalized communities, using this data to block new toxic permits and demand immediate remediation.

title: TENANT ENVIRONMENTAL DEFENSE
description: We fight for renters exposed to mold, lead, and unsafe living conditions, providing legal navigation to force landlord compliance and prevent retaliatory evictions for demanding safe housing.

title: CHRT: ENVIRONMENTAL HAZARDS
description: Our privacy-first tool documents environmental health hazards and discriminatory zoning anonymously, building an undeniable evidentiary record of corporate and municipal neglect.
